economic_notes: First Nation has 51% interest in Helios Whitefish River Limited Partnership and 16.55% interest in Mnidoo Mnising Power Limited Partnership, both accounted for using portfolio method. Also participated in hotel and conference centre development on Manitoulin Island through 7043821 Canada Inc. and Great Lakes Hospitality Group Limited Partnership. Whitefish River Development Corporation and Birch Island Construction Company are fully consolidated subsidiaries.
notes: Fiscal year 2022 (ended March 31, 2022). Consolidated statements include Whitefish River Development Corporation and Birch Island Construction Company on a line-by-line basis. Two GBEs accounted for by portfolio method: Helios Whitefish River LP (51%) and Mnidoo Mnising Power LP (16.55%). total_government_transfers calculated as ISC + CMHC + Government of Canada + Ontario + Anishinabek organizations + OFNLP = 4239116+545797+207851+1208869+4737318+559602 = 11498553. osr = interest and other revenue + user fees etc = 416887+1212986 = 1629873. Landfill closure liability of $379,400 recorded. Budget column is blank (no budget figures provided). Audit report dated March 21, 2023 — approximately one year after fiscal year end.
